diagrams.title: 8-Hour Framework Timeline
diagrams.description: A horizontal timeline showing the progression of topics across 8 hours
elements: Hour 1-2: Vector Spaces Intro + Linear Combinations

diagrams.title: Subspace Verification Flowchart
diagrams.description: Decision flowchart for verifying if a set is a subspace
elements: Yes to all → W is subspace
No to any → Not a subspace
diagrams.purpose: Help students systematically verify subspace criteria
